topic: Joseph and his Coat of Many Colors

script.title: Joseph and His Coat of Many Colors 🌈 | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago, a young boy named Joseph lived with his father Jacob and eleven brothers. Jacob loved Joseph dearly and gave him a beautiful coat of many colors — a gift that sparkled like a rainbow.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of a smiling young boy named Joseph wearing a bright rainbow-striped coat, standing in a sunny green field beside his kind father Jacob, cheerful cartoon style, warm golden light, family-friendly children's Bible art

scenes.narration: Joseph's brothers saw the special coat and became very jealous. Their hearts grew heavy with anger because they wanted their father's love too. Jealousy, like a shadow, crept into their hearts.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of ten older brothers in plain brown and tan robes frowning and whispering together, looking enviously at Joseph's bright rainbow coat in the distance, cheerful cartoon style, biblical desert setting, family-friendly children's Bible art

scenes.narration: One night, Joseph had a wonderful dream. He saw stars and sheaves of wheat bowing down to him. When he told his brothers, their jealousy grew even stronger, and they planned something unkind.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of Joseph sleeping peacefully under a starry purple night sky with glowing golden wheat sheaves floating above him, dreamy magical glow, cheerful cartoon style, family-friendly children's Bible art

scenes.narration: The brothers took Joseph's rainbow coat and sold him to traveling traders headed to Egypt. Joseph was frightened, but deep in his heart he trusted that God was still watching over him.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of a caravan of friendly traders with camels in a golden desert, young Joseph walking with them looking brave, bright blue sky, cheerful cartoon style, biblical setting, family-friendly children's Bible art

scenes.narration: In Egypt, Joseph worked hard and was kind to everyone. God blessed everything he did. Even when troubles came, Joseph kept faith, shining brightly like his rainbow coat used to shine.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of young man Joseph smiling kindly while working in an Egyptian palace garden with palm trees, pyramids in the background, warm sunlight, cheerful cartoon style, family-friendly children's Bible art

scenes.narration: The king of Egypt, called Pharaoh, had puzzling dreams no one could explain. Joseph listened carefully and told Pharaoh what they meant — seven years of plenty, then seven years of hunger.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of Joseph standing before Pharaoh on a golden throne in a bright Egyptian palace, Pharaoh listening with interest, hieroglyphics on the walls, warm golden light, cheerful cartoon style, family-friendly children's Bible art

scenes.narration: Pharaoh trusted Joseph so much he made him ruler over all of Egypt. Joseph stored food during the good years, and when hunger came, his very own brothers traveled to Egypt seeking help.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of Joseph dressed in royal Egyptian robes standing beside huge golden grain storehouses, his brothers approaching in the distance looking weary, bright sunny day, cheerful cartoon style, family-friendly children's Bible art

scenes.narration: Joseph forgave his brothers with a loving heart and welcomed them home. You see, God takes even the hardest moments and weaves them into something beautiful — like a coat of many colors.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of Joseph hugging his brothers tightly in a joyful reunion, everyone smiling with happy tears, a rainbow shining in the sky above them, warm golden light, cheerful cartoon style, family-friendly children's Bible art
